description: §38.9 — a `<channel>` inside `<program>` with no `name=` attribute fires E-CHANNEL-001. The `name` is the required channel identity; it sets the WebSocket URL path `/_scrml_ws/<name>` (§38.3), so a nameless channel has no addressable route.
rationale: §38.3: `name` is a REQUIRED string attribute — the unique channel identifier that sets the WS URL. §38.9 catalogs the absence as E-CHANNEL-001. A `<channel>` with no `name=` SHALL emit E-CHANNEL-001.
